tokenColors.name: Markdown - backslash escapes (beats plain text; same red as MD punctuation)
Markdown - list / emphasis / code delimiters (keyword red)
Markdown - link / image brackets ([ ] like keyword red)
Markdown - indented code block (4 spaces / tab; match body text)
Markdown - fenced code language id (javascript, text, …)
Markdown - table cell text (pipes / dashes use punctuation scopes)
Markdown - table | and separator - (red; compound beats cell rule)
PHP Functions, Keywords and storage modifiers
PHP imported classes in use statements
PHP user constants and enum cases
PHP type punctuation (casts, unions — not phpdoc)
VUE embedded built-in member properties (length, constructor, …)
PHP inherited class and interface names
CSS / SCSS media types (screen, print, all, …)
SCSS/CSS mistaken tag scope on property names (e.g. cursor)
TS definite assignment assertion (! before type)
TS built-in member properties (length, constructor, prototype, …)
TS literal HTML formatting text variables
TS literal HTML formatting text color
JS definite assignment assertion (! before type)
JS built-in member properties (length, constructor, prototype, …)
JS literal HTML formatting text variables
JS literal HTML formatting text color
Markdown - autolink inet `<` `>` (compound; wins over Plain / semantic ties)
Markdown - mailto autolink `>` (grammar names capture 4 instead of 3; `>` often lacks punctuation scope)
